title: Smoothness of radial solutions to Monge-Ampere equations
summary:
We characterize when radial weak solutions to Monge-Ampere equations are
smooth. This paper extends previous partial results and also covers Generalized
Monge-Ampere equations and infinitely vanishing right hand side.

title: Microlocal smoothing effect for the Schr\"odinger evolution equation in   a Gevrey class
summary:
We discuss the microlocal Gevrey smoothing effect for the Schr\"odinger
equation with variable coefficients via the propagation property of the wave
front set of homogenous type. We apply the microlocal exponential estimates in
a Gevrey case to prove our result.

title: A nonlinear theory for shells with slowly varying thickness
summary:
We study the $\Gamma$-limit of 3d nonlinear elasticity for shells of small,
variable thickness, around an arbitrary smooth 2d surface.
